name: Zabaglione Alle Fragiole
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the fresh strawberries with lemon juice and set aside.
2. Mix all remaining ingredients, including the 1 teaspoon lemon juice, in a copper pot.
3. Over medium heat, beat the mixture vigorously until it thickens. Do not let the mixture come to a boil.
4. Pour the zabaglione over the strawberries. It is very important not to allow the mixture to come to a boil. If necessary, remove the pot from the heat occasionally until the desired consistency is reached.
